title: mandragora officinalis
intro: Mandragora officinalis, also known as the lesser mandrake, is a plant species in the nightshade family that is native to Europe and Asia. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antitussive effects. The health benefits of Mandragora officinalis include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as relief from digestive problems, such as cramps and bloating. Mandragora officinalis can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
